content: Resend bounce webhook sends email.bounced events with bounce.type='Permanent' for hard bounces; bounce.type='Temporary' for soft. Hard bounces must be added to a suppression list immediately. Resend retries webhooks on non-200 responses at: 5s, 5m, 30m, 2h, 5h, 10h — idempotency key (svix-id header) must be used to deduplicate. Always return 200 even on internal processing failures. Soft bounce threshold: suppress after 2-3 consecutive failures.
